mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId} AND partner_order_code = #{orderSales} AND ticket_used = false
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_coupons oic ON oi.id = oic.order_item_id JOIN ticket_coupons tc ON oic.ticket_coupon_id = tc.id WHERE oi.partner_id = '0f46cad1-6fb4-4514-938f-d309850f0668' AND tc.used_at IS NULL LIMIT 100
